zh.Little Fransham, Norfolk, England, Unite: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可蕾托 福藍善姆
zh.lifeSummary: Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE於1500年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可蕾托 福藍善姆。他於大約1518年與Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne在英國英格蘭諾福爾可蕾托 福藍善姆結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1550年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: MYNNE
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Menne in Westphalia.

variants.name: Menning
meanings: habitational name from a place called Menning or Menningen in southern Germany.

variants.name: Menn
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Russian Anatoly, Boris, Dmitry, Svetlana.  German Kurt, Otto.
Breton (Finistère; mainly Le Menn): nickname from menn ‘kid, young goat’, perhaps denoting an agile person.

variants.name: Menner
meanings: German and Hungarian: occupational name from Middle High German mener ‘cattle drover’.
German: habitational name for someone from Menne (see   Menne  ).

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE was born in 1500, in Little Fransham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. He married Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne about 1518, in Little Fransham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died in 1550, in Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

Il est décédé en 1550, à Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNEは1500年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクリットル フランシャムで生まれた。約1518年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクリットル フランシャムでMatilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1550年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE(은)는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리틀 프랜샤에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1518년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 리틀 프랜샤에서 Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Edward (MYall-Minn-Mynns) MYNNE родился в 1500 г. в местности литл франшам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda 14GGM Maude Maddie Mynne Jansz Janes Mynne около 1518 г. в местности литл франшам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер в 1550 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.
